---
title: "complex_decompose"
generated: true
description: "Decompose a complex-valued tensor into amplitude and phase components."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:complex_decompose -->
```python
complex_decompose(complex: Complex[Array, ...]) -> Tuple[Float[Array, ...], Float[Array, ...]]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:complex_decompose -->
Decompose a complex-valued tensor into amplitude and phase components.

Together with
[complex_recompose](nitrix._internal.util.complex_recompose.html), this
function provides a uniform interface for switching between complex and
polar representations of complex numbers. This enables us to change the
implementation of these operations in one place when we find the most
efficient and stable method.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:complex_decompose -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `complex` | `Complex[Array, ...]` | — | — | Complex-valued tensor. |

**Returns** `Tuple[Float[Array, ...], Float[Array, ...]]`. Amplitude of each entry in the input tensor. Phase of each entry in the input tensor, in radians.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:complex_decompose -->
### See also

[`complex_recompose`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/complex_recompose.qmd)
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
